description:
Add a periodic check (every 5 minutes via maintenance tasks) that counts feature directories and compares to the last known count. If the count drops by more than 50%, emit a CRITICAL alert via the signal accumulator and refuse to start auto-mode.

Changes needed:
- Add new maintenance task in maintenance-tasks.ts
- Store last known feature count in memory or data/ directory
- Emit critical event when threshold breached
- Auto-mode service checks integrity before starting new features
- Post alert to Discord #infra channel

Acceptance criteria:
- Feature count monitored every 5 minutes
- CRITICAL alert emitted on >50% drop
- Auto-mode blocked when integrity check fails
- Manual override available (force-start flag)
